nasb.text: So Balaam said to Balak, “Behold, I have come now to you! Am I able to speak anything at all? The word that God puts in my mouth, that I shall speak.”

esv.text: Balaam said to Balak, “Behold, I have come to you! Have I now any power of my own to speak anything? The word that God puts in my mouth, that must I speak.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“看哪，我已經來到你這裡，現在我怎能說甚麼呢？　神把甚麼話放在我口裡，我就說甚麼。”

ccb.text: 巴兰说：“现在我已经来了，但我不能随便发言，只能按上帝的指示说话。”
